sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67109" key="mete/ntalma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετέν-ταλμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n67109.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">translatio mandati,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.12.27.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
